description.zh: 获得[[丛刃]]和[[强攻]]基石符文。
description.en: Gain the [[Hail of Blades]] and [[Press the Attack]] runes.

description.zh: 你的普通攻击会对一个额外目标发射一根弩箭，造成30%攻击力的物理伤害并施加攻击特效(100%效力)。
description.en: Basic attacks fire a bolt at an additional target that deals 30% AD physical damage and applies on-hit effects at 100% effectiveness.

description.zh: 每个回合开始时会有一个炸弹附在你身上。在5秒后，它会爆炸，对350码内的敌人造成相当于目标20%最大生命值的真实伤害并将其击飞0.75秒（25秒冷却时间）。
description.en: Automatically attach a bomb to yourself that detonates after 5 seconds, creating an explosion that deals true damage equal to 20% of the target's 'maximum' health to enemies within 350 units and airborne for 0.75 seconds (25 second cooldown).

description.zh: 当650码内有敌方英雄时，自动施放强化版的卡蜜尔技能，在0.75秒后对周围650码内造成200-350(+65%额外AD)(+40%AP)的物理伤害（30秒冷却）。被外沿命中的敌人会受到额外物理伤害，数额相当于其10%(+每100额外AD提升2.5%)(+每100AP提升1.6%)(+每100额外生命值提升0.1%)的最大生命值，并被减速80%（在2秒内衰减）。此外，你会获得相当于对英雄造成外沿伤害80%的治疗。
description.en: Automatically cast an improved version of Camille when an enemy champion is within 650 units of you, winding up over 0.75 seconds to slash in a 650 radius around you. The slash deals 200 to 350 (+ 65% 'bonus' AD) (+ 40% AP) physical damage to enemies within the area (30 second cooldown). Enemies hit by the outer edge of the circle take 'bonus' physical damage equal to 10% (+ 2.5% per 100 'bonus' AD) (+ 1.6% per 100 AP) (+ 0.1% per 100 'bonus' health) of their 'maximum' health and are slow by 80% decaying over 2 seconds. Additionally, you are heal for 80% of the 'bonus' Damage calculated after modifiers damage against enemy champions hit by the outer edge.

description.zh: 获得[[迅捷步法]]和[[不灭之握]]基石符文。
description.en: Gain the [[Fleet Footwork]] and [[Grasp of the Undying]] keystone runes.

description.zh: 获得2个完全随机的强化符文（不包括当前选项中的另外两个）。你有 30% 的几率获得一个白银阶强化符文，并有 70% 的几率获得一个黄金阶强化符文。
description.en: Gain two completely random augments, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment. You have a 30% chance to gain a Silver-tier augment and a 70% chance to receive a Gold-tier augment.

description.zh: 你的攻击造成相当于你75%法术强度的额外物理伤害。
description.en: Basic attacks deal 'bonus' physical damage equal to 75% AP.

description.zh:
将非[[闪现]]位的召唤师技能替换为利刃华尔兹。

利刃华尔兹：让你进入不可被选取状态，在此期间对敌人进行反复突进并造成8次伤害。
description.en:
Replaces the summoner spell in the slot not occupied by Flash with Blade Waltz.

Blade Waltz: Blade Waltz

description.zh: 你的减速效果可使移动速度降低额外的100。
description.en: Your slow effects reduce the movement speed of targets by an additional 100.

description.zh: 你的旋转类技能获得30技能急速并且多造成30%伤害！
description.en: Your Any ability with 'spinning' properties deal 30% increased damage and benefit from 30 ability haste.

description.zh:
获得等同于100%暴击几率的【会心防御几率】，上限为50%。此外，获得25%暴击几率。

【会心防御】：让你有几率使受到的单次伤害降低20%。
description.en:
Gain Critical Defend Chance equal to 100% critical strike chance, up to 50%. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

Critical Defend Chance: Grants you a chance to reduce an instance of damage taken by 20%.

description.zh: 获得20到80法术强度。
description.en: Grants 20 to 80 ability power.

description.zh:
任务：参与击杀 18 次。

奖励：完成后获得【[[金铲铲]]】。

【金铲铲】：
+90 攻击力
+125 法术强度
+20 技能急速
+40 护甲
+40 魔法抗性
+60% 攻击速度
+25% 暴击几率
+350 生命值
+200% 基础生命回复
+350 法力值
+200% 基础法力回复
+10% 移动速度
+15% 全能吸血

唯一被动 - 搞点事情：你永久处于“火力全开！”状态，每秒对 400 码范围内的敌人造成 26 - 43 (基于等级) 魔法伤害并使其灼烧。此外，你的技能冷却时间每 0.25 秒缩短 0.2 秒，并获得 5% 额外移动速度 (在面朝附近敌方英雄时提升至 20%)、20% 额外攻击速度、50 - 900 (基于等级) 额外生命值、1.5 额外法力回复以及 4 额外能量回复。在“火力全开！”状态下，你受到的伤害也会提升 25% / 35%，且受到的治疗和护盾效果降低 25%。
description.en:
Quest: Score 18 champion takedowns.

Reward: Upon completion, receive The Golden Spatula.

The Golden Spatula:
+90 AD
+125 AP
+20 Ability Haste
+40 Armor
+40 Magic Resist
+60% Attack Speed
+25% Critical Strike Chance
+350 Health
+200% Base Health Regen
+350 Mana
+200% Base Mana Regen
+10% Movement Speed
+15% Omnivamp

Unique – Doing Something: You are permanently On Fire!, causing you to burn enemies within 400 units every second for 26 - 43 (based on level) magic damage and reduce your abilities' cooldowns by 0.2 seconds every 0.25 seconds as well as gain 5% bonus movement speed, increased to 20% while facing nearby enemy champions, 20% bonus attack speed, 50 - 900 (based on level) bonus health, 1.5 bonus mana regeneration, and 4 bonus energy regeneration. While On Fire!, however, you also take 25% / 35% increased damage and reduce the effectiveness of incoming heals and shields by 25%.

description.zh: 对敌人造成伤害时会施加持续4秒的一层效果，使其护甲和魔法抗性降低1.5%，至多叠加20层（总计30%双抗击碎）。
description.en: Each instance of damage dealt to an enemy reduces their armor and magic resistance by 1.5% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20 times for a total of 30% resistances reduction.

description.zh: 每次普通攻击提供6-18法术强度，每次技能伤害提供3-9攻击力，持续5秒。持续时间可刷新且可无限叠加。
description.en: Basic attacks on-hit grant 6 to 18 ability power and damaging abilities once per cast instance grant 3 to 9 'bonus' attack damage, lasting for 5 seconds, with the duration of both refreshing on subsequent hits, and stacking infinitely.

description.zh: 每第4次攻击消耗层数对目标快速发射4枚烟花，每枚烟花造成11-80(+35%额外AD)(+19%AP)的额外魔法伤害，总计造成44-320(+140%额外AD)(+76%AP)伤害。
description.en: Basic attacks generate a stack, up to 4. The fourth stack consumes them all to quickly launch 4 fireworks at the target that each deal 11 to 80 (+ 35% 'bonus' AD) (+ 19% AP) 'bonus' magic damage on-hit, for a total of 11*4 to 80*4 (+ 35*4% 'bonus' AD) (+ 19*4% AP).

description.zh: 获得蕾欧娜被动：你的技能会标记敌人，使其在被你的队友的下一次攻击或技能命中时受到额外的40-200(+3%目标最大生命值)的魔法伤害（每个目标有0.75秒冷却）。
description.en:
Gain Leona.

Sunlight: Your abilities mark enemies, causing them to take 40 to 200 (+ 3% of target's 'maximum' health) 'bonus' magic damage from your ally's next basic attack or ability hit against them (0.75-second cooldown per target).

description.zh: 在1000码内用技能对敌方英雄造成伤害时，会对其发射3个魔法飞弹，每个飞弹造成0.33%最大生命值的真实伤害，基于飞行距离至多提升至1%。同一次施法每6秒仅能触发一次。
description.en: Dealing damage to an enemy champion with an ability within 1000 units fires 3 missiles at them that each deal true damage equal to 0.33% of the target's 'maximum' health, increased to up to 1% based on distance travelled. This effect can only trigger once every 6 seconds from the same cast.

description.zh: 获得一个可吸收相当于300%法术强度伤害的护盾，持续时间永久。在复活时会重置该护盾。
description.en: Gain a shield that absorbs damage equal to 300% AP and lasts until destroyed. Shield is replenished upon respawn.

description.zh: 装备伤害和持续伤害效果（DoT）现在可以暴击，造成145%（+额外暴击伤害）的伤害。此外，获得25%暴击几率。
description.en: Damage dealt by items and damage over time effects can now critical strike for (145% + 'bonus' critical damage) damage. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

description.zh:
获得小丑大招“萨科、萨科”和萨科爆炸。将未被[[闪现]]占用的召唤师技能栏替换为“萨科、萨科”。

被动 - 背刺：从背后攻击敌人时，你的普通攻击会造成 20 至 35 (+ 50% 额外攻击力) (+ 35% 法术强度) 的物理攻击特效伤害。

主动 - 欺诈魔术：在 0.125 秒延迟后，进入隐形状态，持续最多 3 秒，并传送至 400 码内的目标位置。你在隐形状态下的下一次普通攻击会造成 100 (+ 150% 额外攻击力) (+ 55% 法术强度) 额外物理伤害，如果触发了背刺，该伤害将提升至 155%（45 秒冷却时间）。

被动 - 幻象：在你死亡时，在死亡地点 350 半径范围内引发爆炸，对其中的敌人造成 目标 25% 最大生命值 的真实伤害。此外，你会在死亡位置部署一个惊吓宝盒，立即恐惧附近的敌人 1 秒。该宝盒不会攻击，但会持续 3 秒。
description.en:
Gain Shaco Shaco, Shaco and Shaco explosion. Replaces the summoner spell in the slot not occupied by [[Flash]] with Shaco.

Passive - Backstab: Your basic attacks deal 20 to 35 (+ 50% 'bonus' AD) (+ 35% AP) physical on-hit when hitting an enemy from behind.

Active - Deceive: Become invisible for up to 3 seconds and blink to the target location within 400 units after a 0.125-second delay. Your next basic attack while in stealth deals 100 (+ 150% 'bonus' AD) (+ 55% AP) 'bonus' physical damage, increased to155% damageif Backstab was applied (45 second cooldown).

Passive - Hallucinate: Upon your death, release an explosion in a 350 radius of your death location, dealing 25% of target's 'maximum' health true damage to enemies within. Additionally, you deploy a box at the location of your death that instantly fear nearby enemies for 1 second. This box does not attack but lasts for 3 seconds.

description.zh: 在每回合开始或复活时，你的体型要么变大（获得30%适应之力、20%额外生命值和40%体型），要么变小（获得70技能急速、40%额外移动速度和40%体型缩减）。
description.en: Upon acquiring this augment and each time you respawn, gain either 30% adaptive force, 20% 'bonus' health, and 40% increased size or 70 ability haste, 40% 'bonus' movement speed, and 40% reduced size.

description.zh: 你获得山脉龙魂，在脱离战斗之后获得一个持续一小段时间的护盾。
description.en: Grants the Mountain Dragon Soul, or a different Dragon Soul if one is already obtained.

description.zh: 每回合施放一次终极技能后会刷新其冷却时间（75秒冷却，阵亡后重置）。
description.en: Casting your ultimate ability resets its cooldown immediately after its effect For instant-cast spells or has For duration-based spells (75 second cooldown, reset upon death).

description.zh: 你的基础攻击速度被锁定为0.625，且不再受任何攻速加成影响。作为回报，你获得25额外攻击力，并且每1%额外攻速都会转化为1额外攻击力。
description.en: Your 'base' attack speed is set to a static amount of 0.625 and your attack rate no longer benefits from any source of attack speed bonuses. In return, you gain 25 'bonus' attack damage and convert every 1% 'bonus' attack speed into 1 'bonus' attack damage.

description.zh: 每6.5秒，自动在周围450码引发寒冰脉冲，对附近的敌人造成1.25秒禁锢。
description.en: Automatically cast Lissandra, creating a cold pulse around you in 450 radius that root nearby enemies for 1.25 seconds (6.5 second cooldown).

description.zh: 获得[[致命节奏]]和[[征服者]]基石符文。
description.en: Gain the [[Conqueror]] and [[Lethal Tempo]] keystone runes.

description.zh: 获得相当于30% 法术强度的技能急速。
description.en: Gain ability haste equal to 30% AP.

description.zh: 获得【海洋龙魂】，在对敌方英雄造成伤害后提供高额的生命和法力回复。
description.en: Grants the Ocean Dragon Soul, which has a modified base heal value of 100, or a different Dragon Soul if one is already obtained.

description.zh: 每当你定身或缚地一个敌人时，获得可叠加的适应之力。阵亡时损失层数。
description.en: Gain a stack of Adaptive Force when you immobilize or root an enemy. Lose a stack when you die.

description.zh: 你的治疗和生命回复会对 1000 码内最近的敌方英雄造成魔法伤害，数值相当于治疗量的 70%。
description.en: Your heals and health regeneration deal magic damage to the nearest enemy champion within 1000 units equal to 70% of the amount healed.

name.zh: 任务：沃格勒特的巫师帽

description.zh:
即刻：获得【[[无用大棒]]】。

任务：持有【[[灭世者的死亡之帽]]】和【[[中娅沙漏]]】。

奖励：完成后，将上述装备合成为【[[沃格勒特的巫师帽]]】。

【沃格勒特的巫师帽】：
+300 法术强度
+20 技能急速
+50 护甲

唯一主动 - 凝滞：让英雄在 2.5 秒里进入凝滞状态，在此期间不可被选取且免疫任何伤害，但无法移动、攻击、施放技能或使用道具（20 秒冷却时间）。
description.en:
Gain a [[Needlessly Large Rod]].

Quest: Obtain [[Rabadon's Deathcap]] and [[Zhonya's Hourglass]].

Reward: Upon completion, convert the items into [[Wooglet's Witchcap]].

Wooglet's Witchcap:
+300 AP
+20 Ability Haste
+50 Armor

Unique Active - Stasis: Put yourself in stasis for 2.5 seconds, rendering you untargetable and invulnerable for the duration but also unable to move, attack, cast abilities, or use items (20 second cooldown).

description.zh:
你的冲刺、闪烁或传送会在身后留下一条轨迹，在 0.75 秒后爆炸，对 300 码范围内的敌人造成 70 - 210 (基于等级) (+ 125% 额外攻击力) (+ 60% 法术强度) 的物理伤害（对小兵造成 70% 伤害）。

敌人每 1 秒内至多受到一次爆炸伤害。最大触发距离为 2000 码。

每支队伍最多 2 名玩家可拥有此强化。
description.en:
Your Dash, Blink, or Teleport effects leave a trail that detonates after 0.75 seconds, dealing 70 - 210 (based on level) (+ 125% bonus AD) (+ 60% AP) physical damage to enemies within 300 units (70% damage to minions).

Enemies can only be damaged once every 1 second. Max trigger range is 2000 units.

Limited to 2 players per team.

description.zh: 获得75攻击距离，如果你是远程英雄则降低至50攻击距离。
description.en: Gain 50 'bonus' attack range.

description.zh: 你的Q获得100技能急速。
description.en: Your champion's first basic ability (Q) gains 100 ability haste.

description.zh: 获得25攻击力、10技能急速和5穿甲。
description.en: Grants 25 'bonus' attack damage, 10 ability haste, and 5 lethality.

description.zh: 在为你的友军提供增益效果、治疗效果或护盾效果时，会对其附近的敌人们造成伤害和减速。
description.en: Granting a buff, heal, or shield to your ally deals 30 to 150 true damage to enemies within 450 units of them and slow targets by 30% for 2 seconds (2 second cooldown).

description.zh: 每第三次攻击，你附带的攻击特效会触发第二次。
description.en: Basic attacks generate a stack, up to 2 times. At 2 stacks, your next basic attack consumes all stacks to apply on-hit effects again at 150% effectiveness.

description.zh: 获得1500生命值，但你造成的伤害降低10%。
description.en: Gain 1500 'bonus' health, but reduce your damage output by 10%.

description.zh: 你的W获得100技能急速。
description.en: Your champion's second basic ability (W) gains 100 ability haste.

description.zh: 获得额外移动速度，数额相当于你100%的技能急速。
description.en: Grants 'bonus' movement speed equal to 100% ability haste.

description.zh:
你的治疗和护盾会向 650 码内最近的敌方英雄发射一枚飞弹，命中后施加灼烧效果，在 5 秒内每秒造成相当于目标 0.2% 最大生命值的魔法伤害，共计 1%（1.5秒冷却时间）。

灼烧伤害会根据治疗或护盾数值占友军最大生命值的比例提升，最高每秒 0.8% （共计 4%）。
description.en:
Your heals and shields fire a missile at the nearest enemy champion within 650 units. Upon arrival, it applies a Burn that deals magic damage equal to 0.2% of the target's maximum health every second for 5 seconds, totaling 1% (1.5s cooldown).

The Burn damage increases based on the heal/shield strength relative to the ally's maximum health, up to 0.8% per second (total 4%).

description.zh: 你的法力值消耗翻倍。你的技能的治疗效果、护盾效果和伤害获得提升，提升幅度基于你的最大法力值。
description.en: Your abilities' mana costs are doubled, but you also gain 10% (+ 0.5% per 100 'maximum' mana) increased damage as well as self and outgoing heal and shield.

description.zh:
将未被[[闪现]]占用的召唤师技能替换为“感受灼烧”。此外，[[引燃]]现在被视为灼烧来源。

感受灼烧：对 800 码范围内的所有敌方英雄同时施加[[虚弱]]和[[引燃]]。
虚弱的减速效果提升至 50%。
引燃在该期间造成的伤害调整为 70 - 410 (基于等级) 真实伤害。
description.en:
Replaces the summoner spell in the slot not occupied by [[Flash]] with Feel the Burn. Additionally, [[Ignite]] counts as a Burn source.

Feel the Burn: Casts both [[Exhaust]] and [[Ignite]] on all enemy champions within 800 units.
The Exhaust slow strength is increased to 50%.
The Ignite deals 70 - 410 (based on level) true damage over the duration.

description.zh: 禁锢或压制敌方英雄将为你回复30 至 250(+1.5%最大生命值)生命值（每次施法实例冷却时间 5 秒）。
description.en: Immobilize or ground an enemy champion heal you for 30 to 250 (+ 1.5% 'maximum' health) (5 second cooldown per cast instance).

description.zh: 获得200攻击距离，如果你是远程英雄则降低至100攻击距离。
description.en: Gain 100 'bonus' attack range.

description.zh: 你获得<font color = '#f30c1a'>余烬之冠</font>和<font color = '#1542ea'>洞悉之冠</font>。
description.en: Grants Crest of Cinders and Crest of Insight permanently.

description.zh: 你的冲刺或闪烁会为你提供12额外护甲和额外魔法抗性，至多叠加5层（总计60点）。每60秒层数会重置。
description.en: Dash or blink grants 12 'bonus' armor and 'bonus' magic resistance, stacking up to 5 times for a total of 60 'bonus' resistances. Stacks are reset every 60 seconds since acquiring the augment.

description.zh: 当你的移动速度每比目标高出10 点时，造成的伤害提高 1%。
description.en: Deal 1% increased damage per 10 movement speed you have more than the target.

description.zh: 在使用一个冲刺、跳跃、闪烁或传送类技能或离开潜行状态之后，获得持续2秒的300移动速度。
description.en: After dash, blink, or exiting stealth, gain 300 'bonus' movement speed for 2 seconds.

description.zh:
你的技能命中敌方英雄时，会施加一层持续 3 秒的灼烧，在持续时间内造成 6 - 60 (基于等级) (+ 14% 额外攻击力) (+ 6% 法术强度) 的魔法伤害（每次施法有 1 秒冷却时间）。灼烧可无限叠加，且每次施加时刷新持续时间。

此外，你的所有灼烧效果每造成一次伤害，你的基础技能冷却时间就会缩短 0.08 秒。
description.en:
Your ability hits against champions apply a Burn for 3 seconds that deals 6 - 60 (based on level) (+ 14% bonus AD) (+ 6% AP) magic damage over the duration (1 second cooldown per cast instance). This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application.

Additionally, all of your Burn effects reduce the cooldowns of all your basic abilities by 0.08 seconds for each tick of damage they deal to a target.

mechanism.zh: 队伍中多个英雄拥有该符文时，共享灼烧效果提供的冷却缩减。
mechanism.en: When multiple champions have this rune, they share the cooldown reduction provided by the Burn effect.

description.zh: 将额外攻击力转化为法术强度。获得15%法术强度。
description.en: Convert 'all' of your 'bonus' attack damage into ability power at a rate of 1 ability power per 0.6 'bonus' attack damage. Additionally, increase your ability power by 15%.

description.zh: 你的英雄技能造成的伤害提升 35%，获得 70 技能急速，并且所有来源的治疗和护盾效果提升 35%。作为代价，你的终极技能将被永久封印。
description.en: Your champion's abilities deal 35% increased damage. Gain 70 Ability Haste, and 35% increased healing and shielding from all sources. However, your Ultimate ability is permanently Sealed.

description.zh: 你的暴击会为你提供相当于伤害值12%的治疗。此外，获得25%暴击几率。
description.en: Your critical strike heal you for 12% of damage dealt. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

mechanism.zh: 目前可与珠光护手产生联动 BUG，回复大量生命值

description.zh: 自动施放塔里克大招：召唤一颗保护星在你身上，在2.5秒后降落。随后你和400码内的友军进入持续2.5秒的伤害免疫状态（35秒冷却）。
description.en: Automatically cast Taric, calling down a protective star upon you that descends over 2.5 seconds. Afterwards, you and all allied champions within 400 units become invulnerable for 2.5 seconds (35 second cooldown).

description.zh: 获得18%护甲穿透和法术穿透。
description.en: Grants 18% armor penetration and magic penetration.

description.zh: 你的E获得100技能急速。
description.en: Your champion's third basic ability (E) gains 100 ability haste.

description.zh: 获[[余震]]和[[冰川增幅]]基石符文。
description.en: Gain the Aftershock and Glacial Augment keystone runes.

description.zh: 将你的所有强化符文变为随机的棱彩阶强化符文。
description.en: Your current augments transform into an equal number of completely random Prismatic ones.

description.zh: 你的周围环绕着烈焰。每秒对 500 码范围内的敌方英雄施加一层持续 3 秒的灼烧，在持续时间内造成相当于你最大生命值 2% 的魔法伤害。灼烧可无限叠加，且每次施加时刷新持续时间。
description.en: Surrounds you in flames. Every second, apply a Burn for 3 seconds to enemy champions within 500 units, dealing magic damage equal to 2% of your maximum health over the duration. This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application.

description.zh: 你的普通攻击会向目标发射一枚次级弩箭，造成 40% 攻击伤害并施加 40% 效能的攻击特效。此外，获得 20% 总攻击速度。
description.en: Your basic attacks fire an additional bolt at the target, dealing 40% of the attack's damage and applying on-hit effects at 40% effectiveness. Additionally, gain 20% total Attack Speed.

description.zh: 获得15%全能吸血。
description.en: Gain 15% omnivamp.

description.zh: 获得20%治疗和护盾强度。
description.en: Grants 20% heal and shield power.

description.zh: 每10秒自动朝着1250码内最近的敌方英雄施放希维尔Q技能，造成40-200(+30%额外AD)(+20%AP)的自适应伤害。
description.en: Automatically cast Sivir at the closest nearby enemy champion within 1250 units, dealing 40 to 200 (+ 30% 'bonus' AD) (+ 20% AP) adaptive damage to enemies hit (10 second cooldown).

description.zh: 获得250攻击距离，如果你是远程英雄则降低至150攻击距离。
description.en: Gain 150 'bonus' attack range.

description.zh: 将法术强度转化为额外攻击力。获得15%攻击力。
description.en: Convert 'all' of your ability power into 'bonus' attack damage at a rate of 1 'bonus' attack damage per 1.66 ability power. Additionally, increase your 'total' attack damage by 15%.

description.zh: 你的终极技能对敌人造成伤害时会将其变形2秒，期间其基础移速降低60并在持续期间被缴械（每个目标15秒冷却）。
description.en: Damaging enemies with your ultimate ability polymorph them into harmless critters for 2 seconds, during which their 'base' movement speed is reduced by 60, and disarm them for the same duration (15 second cooldown per target).

description.zh: 你的攻击会施加一个可无限叠加的灼烧攻击特效，持续造成伤害。
description.en: Basic attacks apply a Burn for 5 seconds that deals 'bonus' magic damage equal to2% of the target's 'maximum' health over the duration.This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application.

description.zh: 你的【[[闪现]]】现在拥有3层充能，每次使用之间有2秒冷却（全部3层充能的充能时间为120秒）。
description.en:
Your [[Flash]] now has 3 charges with a 2-second cooldown between casts (120 seconds recharge time for all 3 charges).

'This augment is currently disabled.'

description.zh: 你的攻击会为你提供10移动速度，可无限叠加。获得相当于你10% 移动速度的攻击速度。
description.en: Basic attacks on-hit against enemy champions and minions grant 10 'bonus' movement speed, lasting for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent triggers, and stacking infinitely. Additionally, gain 'bonus' attack speed equal to 10% 'total' movement speed.

description.zh: 对750码内每个基本方位（上下左右）的下次普攻会额外发射5枚爆竹，每枚箭矢造成10-52.5(+15%额外AD)的物理伤害。每枚箭矢可以暴击并施加20%效力的攻击特效（每个方向单独5秒冷却）。
description.en: Your next basic attack in each cardinal direction within 750 range additionally on-attack fires 5 firecrackers at the target that each deal 10 to 52.5 (+ 15% 'bonus' AD) physical damage, for a total of 10*5 to 52.5*5 (+ 15*5% 'bonus' AD) physical damage (5 second cooldown per direction). Bolts' damage is increased by 0 to 50 for 11. Each bolt can critically strike and applies on-hit effects at 20% effectiveness.

description.zh: 定身或缚地敌方英雄时提供一层灼烧，这个效果会持续造成伤害并可无限叠加。
description.en: Immobilize or ground an enemy champion inflicts them with a Burn for 5 seconds, dealing magic damage equal to4% of the target's 'maximum' health over the duration(5 second cooldown per cast instance). This Burn stacks infinitely and refreshes with each application.

description.zh: 你的召唤物获得40%的伤害提升、额外生命值和体型提升。
description.en: Your pet deal 40% increased damage as well as gain 40% 'bonus' health and size.

description.zh: 参与击杀英雄会获得一层叠加效果。每层效果提升5%最大生命值和体型。阵亡时失去65%层数。
description.en: Scoring a champion takedown generates a stack. For each stack, increase your 'maximum' health and size by 5%. Lose 65% of stacks on death.

description.zh: 你的技能可施加攻击特效。每个目标有1秒冷却时间。
description.en: Your abilities apply on-hit effects at 100% effectiveness (1 second cooldown per target).

description.zh: 获得3个随机龙魂。
description.en: Grants 3 random Dragon Souls.

description.zh: 在生命值跌到50%以下时，会在3秒内获得30%最大生命值的治疗（45秒冷却，阵亡重置）。
description.en: Upon dropping below 50% 'maximum' health, you are heal for 30% 'maximum' health over 3 seconds (45 second cooldown, reset upon death).

description.zh: 获得[[先攻]]和[[黑暗收割]]基石符文。
description.en: Gain the [[Dark Harvest]] and [[First Strike]] keystone runes.

description.zh: 施放你的终极技能会使你进入短时间的免疫伤害状态。
description.en: Casting your ultimate grants you invulnerability for 2 seconds (8 second cooldown).

description.zh: 获得50%暴击几率。
description.en: Grants 50% critical strike chance.

description.zh: 施放终极技能后获得3秒的控制免疫（8秒冷却）。
description.en: Casting your ultimate ability grants you cc-immune for 3 seconds (8 second cooldown).

description.zh: 获得60技能急速。
description.en: Grants 60 ability haste.

description.zh: 获得60%攻击速度。
description.en: Grants 60% 'bonus' attack speed.

description.zh: 体型变大，获得35%生命值和15%适应之力。
description.en: Grants 35% 'bonus' health, 15% adaptive force, and 50% increased size.

description.zh: 获得50移动速度和40%减速抗性。
description.en: Gain 50 'bonus' movement speed and 40% slow resist.

description.zh: 在2秒后，一只水豚会降落到地面，对落点处的敌人造成25%最大生命值的真实伤害。
description.en: After 2 seconds, a Capybara lands on the ground, dealing 25% max Health true damage.

description.zh: 攻击特效使你的各个技能的冷却时间缩减1.25秒。
description.en: Attack effects reduce the cooldown of each of your skills by 1.25 seconds.

description.zh: 获得100%移动速度，在受到伤害后失效3秒。
description.en: Gain 100% 'bonus' movement speed. This bonus is lost for 3 seconds after taking damage from champions.

description.zh: 普通攻击造成相当于你3.5%最大生命值的额外物理伤害。
description.en: Basic attacks deal 'bonus' physical damage equal to 3.5% of your 'maximum' health.

description.zh: 施放技能时会为你提供5-60(+1%最大生命值)的治疗。
description.en: Casting an ability heal you for 5 to 60 (+ 1% 'maximum' health).

description.zh: 体型缩小75%，获得30%额外移动速度。此外，对体型大于你的敌方英雄造成10%/15%/25%/30%额外伤害。
description.en: Become tiny, reducing your size by 75% and gaining 30% 'bonus' movement speed. Additionally, deal 10;15;25;30 'bonus' damage against enemy champions with greater size than you.

description.zh: 获得1个随机棱彩阶强化符文。
description.en: Gain one random Prismatic augment, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

description.zh: 你的治疗和护盾可以暴击，获得40%额外数额的效果。获得25%暴击几率。
description.en: Your heals and shields now have a chance equal to your critical strike chance to increase in effectiveness by 40%. Additionally, gain 25% critical strike chance.

mechanism.zh: 拥有5秒的内置CD，暴击弹道(CriticalMissleTriggerRange)有550码的触发范围
mechanism.en: Has a 5 second internal cooldown. Critical strike projectiles have a 550 unit trigger range.(CriticalMissleTriggerRange)

description.zh: 获得1个随机黄金阶强化符文。
description.en: Gain one random Gold augment, excluding the other two offerings in your current assortment.

description.zh: 获得100装备急速（相当于50%装备冷却缩减）。
description.en: Grants 100 item haste, which is equivalent to 50% cooldown reduction for items.

description.zh: 你对友军英雄施放的治疗和护盾效力提升30%。
description.en: Your heals and shields on allied champions are increased in effectiveness by 30%.

description.zh: 获得召唤：艾黎和奥术彗星基石符文。
description.en: Gain the Arcane Comet and Summon Aery keystone runes.

description.zh: 带有冲刺、跳跃、闪烁或传送类效果的技能获得175技能急速。
description.en: Abilities with dash or blink gain 175 ability haste.

description.zh: 全来源加成的额外攻击速度提升20%。当你的攻击速度达到1.75或更高时，你的普通攻击附带40点额外魔法伤害。
description.en: Increase your 'bonus' attack speed gained from all sources by 20%. While at 1.75 attack speed or higher, your basic attacks deal 40 'bonus' magic damage on-hit.

description.zh: 在你跌下35%最大生命值时，将周围500码内的敌人全部击退并减速90%，持续1.5秒（25秒冷却，复活重置）。
description.en: Upon dropping below 35% of your 'maximum' health, you airborne all enemies within a 500 radius by 750 units and slow them by 90% for 1.5 seconds (25 second cooldown, resets upon death).

description.zh: 在命中敌方英雄时，若自身与目标的距离至少为 700 个单位，则该基础技能的“当前”冷却时间将缩减其“总”冷却时间的 80%；对于持续伤害类技能，该缩减效果调整为 65%。
description.en: Hitting an enemy champion with a basic ability while located at least  700 units away from them at the time of the hit reduces its 'current' cooldown by 80% of its 'total' cooldown, modified to 65% for damage over time abilities.

description.zh: 变成近战英雄，攻击距离锁定为200。此外，获得30%额外攻击力、25%额外攻击速度、30%额外生命值、25%额外移动速度和20%生命偷取。仅限远程英雄选择。
description.en:
Become melee, modifying your attack range to 200 units. Additionally, gain 30% 'bonus' attack damage, 25% 'bonus' attack speed, 30% 'bonus' health, 25% 'bonus' movement speed, and 20% life steal. These bonuses are increased by 0 to 30 for 11.

This augment is only available for ranged champions.

description.zh: 你在移动时持续获得治疗（每移动10码回复20/100-120/100(+1/100%最大生命值)）。
description.en: Heal for 20/100 to 120/100 (+ 1/100% 'maximum' health) per 10 units travelled.

description.zh: 阵亡时，你会爆炸并对500码内的敌人造成相当于其20%最大生命值的真实伤害。
description.en: Upon death, you explode to deal true damage equal to 20% of the target's 'maximum' health to enemies within 500 units.

description.zh: 使你的攻击力提升20%。
description.en: Increases attack damage by 20%.

description.zh: 使用【[[闪现]]】会在目的地点引发爆炸，对附近的敌人造成70-240(+70%额外AD)(+60%AP)的魔法伤害并使其减速35%，持续1.25秒。此外，【闪现】的冷却时间会在你阵亡时重置。
description.en: Using [[Flash]] creates an explosion around the blink location that deals 70 to 240 (+ 70% AD) (+ 60% AP) magic damage to nearby enemies and slow them by 35% for 1.25 seconds. Additionally, the cooldown of your Flash resets upon your death.

description.zh: 普通攻击使目标的伤害降低15%，持续3秒，可叠加。目标在持续期间的体型也会显著缩小。
description.en: Basic attacks reduce the target's damage dealt by 15% for 3 seconds, refreshing with each hit. Their size is also reduced significantly for the duration.

description.zh: 使“[[心之钢]]”庞然吞噬所获得的“额外”生命值提升 200%。
description.en: Increases the 'bonus' health gained from [[Heartsteel]] Colossal Consumption by 200%.

description.zh: 对生命值低于30%的敌人们多造成10%伤害。参与击杀英雄会重置你所有基础技能的冷却时间。
description.en: Deal 10% increased damage to enemies below 30% of their 'maximum' health. Scoring a champion takedown resets the cooldown of all your basic abilities.

description.zh: 对敌方英雄造成定身或缚地效果时，会获得一个持续 3 秒的护盾，可吸收 150 至 450（+ 5% 最大生命值）伤害（每次施法触发有 5 秒冷却时间）。多次触发此效果时护盾可以叠加，但不会刷新之前护盾的持续时间。
description.en: immobilize or ground an enemy champion grants a shield for 3 seconds that absorbs 150 to 450 (+ 5% 'maximum' health) damage (5 second cooldown per cast instance). Shields can stack between multiple triggers of this effect, though not refreshing the duration of previous shields.

description.zh: 你获得炼狱龙魂，在你用技能或攻击命中敌人时造成额外伤害。
description.en: Grants the Infernal Dragon Soul, or a different Dragon Soul if one is already obtained.

description.zh: 使你的最大生命值提升，数额相当于你一半的法力值。
description.en: Grants 'bonus' health equal to 50% 'maximum' mana.

description.zh: 在施放终极技能后，你会为所有敌方英雄施加一个死亡标记（8秒冷却）。标记会存储带标记期间你对其造成伤害的40%，并在5秒后引爆，造成等同于存储伤害值的真实伤害。
description.en: Upon casting your ultimate ability, you apply Zed to all enemy champions (8 second cooldown). The mark stores 40% of all Damage calculated before modifiers damage you deal to the affected target, detonating after 5 seconds to deal true damage equal to the damage stored against them.

description.zh: 获得1000%基础生命回复。当你的生命值低于25%时，回复量提升至2000%。
description.en: Grants 1000% 'base' health regeneration, increased to 2000% while below 25% 'maximum' health.

description.zh: 你的技能可以造成暴击，造成145%（+额外暴击伤害）的伤害。此外，获得25%（+每100AP提升4.5%）的暴击几率。
description.en:
Your abilities can now critical strike for (145% + 'bonus' critical damage) damage. Additionally, gain 25% (+ 4.5% per 100 AP) critical strike chance.

If both Jeweled Gauntlet and Vulnerability are equipped, only rolls the critical strike chance of the augment that has the higher critical damage (or either if equal).

mechanism.zh: 目前可与灵魂虹吸产生联动 BUG，回复大量生命值

description.zh: 自动在自己身上安装一颗炸弹，5 秒后引爆，对 350 码范围内的敌人造成相当于目标最大生命值 20%的真实伤害，并将其击飞 0.75 秒（25 秒冷却时间）。
description.en: Automatically attach a bomb to yourself that detonates after 5 seconds, creating an explosion that deals true damage equal to 20% of the target's maximum health to enemies within 350 units and knocks them up for 0.75 seconds (25 second cooldown).

description.zh: 将未被闪现占用的召唤师技能槽位替换为[[闪现]]。此外，获得 70 召唤师技能急速。装备此强化后，你的两个召唤师技能槽位都将变为闪现，且在使用其中任何一个时，它们不会共享冷却时间。
description.en:
Replaces the summoner spell in the slot not occupied by Flash with [[Flash]]. Additionally, gain 70 summoner spell haste.

You have Flash in both of your summoner spell slots while equipped with this augment, and they do not share cooldowns when either of them are used.

description.zh: 定身或缚地敌方英雄会提供 2 – 10（基于等级）额外护甲和额外魔法抗性，持续 10 秒，最多可叠加 10 层，总计提供 20 – 100（基于等级）额外双抗，后续触发会刷新持续时间。
description.en: immobilize or ground an enemy champion grants 2 to 10 'bonus' armor and 'bonus' magic resistance for 10 seconds, stacking up to 10 times for a total of 2*10 to 10*10 'bonus' resistances, and refreshing on subsequent triggers.

description.zh: 你的回城变为强化回城。此外，离开商店后仍可购买物品，且泉水会为你提供回复。
description.en: Your Recall is now functional and is upgraded to Empowered Recall. Additionally, you no longer lose the ability to purchase items from the shop after exiting the shop area, and the fountain will now provide healing and resource restoration for you.

description.zh: 当你的生命值跌至 35% 最大生命值以下时，获得一个相当于 65% 最大生命值的护盾，增加 150% 额外移动速度，并缩小体型（75 秒冷却时间）。这些效果都会在 5.5 秒内衰减。
description.en: Upon dropping below 35% of your 'maximum' health, gain a shield for 65% of your 'maximum' health, 150% 'bonus' movement speed, and reduced size (75 second cooldown). These effects all decay over 5.5 seconds.

wikiNote: 这是从 Wiki 发现但本地数据库缺失的条目

description.zh: 每拥有一件头部装备或帽子类物品，获得 15 法术强度和 8 额外魔法抗性；对于通过帽子饮品获得的帽子，该加成降低至 8 法术强度和 4 额外魔法抗性。
description.en: Gain 15 ability power and 8 'bonus' magic resistance for each headwear item or hat you have in your inventory, reduced to 8 ability power and 4 'bonus' magic resistance for hats obtained from Cappa Juice.

mechanism.zh:
以下物品将被视作头饰/帽子类装备，适用于「帽上加帽」强化符文：

[[深渊面具]]，[[放血者的诅咒]]，[[星界驱驰]]，[[夜之锋刃]]，[[海克斯注力刚壁]]，[[末日寒冬]]，[[幽魂面具]]，[[璀璨回响]]，[[狂妄]]，[[千变者贾修]]，[[骑士之誓]]，[[兰德里的苦楚]]，[[灭世者的死亡之帽]]，[[裂隙制造者]]，[[舒瑞娅的战歌]]，[[幽魂斗篷]]，[[沃格勒特的巫师帽]], [[耳语头环]], [[歌之权冠]]
mechanism.en:
The following items will count as headwear/hats items for the Hat on a Hat augment:

[[Abyssal Mask]], [[Bloodletter's Curse]], [[Cosmic Drive]], [[Edge of Night]], [[Experimental Hexplate]], [[Fimbulwinter]], [[Haunting Guise]], [[Hollow Radiance]], [[Hubris]], [[Jak'Sho, The Protean]], [[Knight's Vow]], [[Liandry's Torment]], [[Rabadon's Deathcap]], [[Riftmaker]], [[Shurelya's Battlesong]], [[Spectre's Cowl]], [[Wooglet's Witchcap]], [[Whispering Circlet]], [[Diadem of Songs]]

description.zh: 获得护盾时，获得 40 – 100（基于等级） An icon representing the keyword Adaptive force 适应之力，持续 3 秒（5 秒冷却时间）。
description.en: Gain 40 to 100 adaptive force for 3 seconds upon gaining a shield (5 second cooldown).

wikiNote: 这是从 Wiki 发现但本地数据库缺失的条目

description.zh: 将未被[[闪现]]占用的召唤师技能槽位替换为“吵闹鬼”。吵闹鬼：对自己施放[[屏障]]和[[幽灵疾步]]，持续时间均为 5 秒。前者提供 110 – 440（基于等级）的护盾，后者提供 30% 额外移动速度。
description.en:
Replaces the summoner spell in the slot not occupied by [[Flash]] with Poltergeist.

Poltergeist: Casts both [[Shield]] and [[Ghost Walk]] on yourself for 5 seconds each. The Shield provides 110 to 440 'bonus' armor, and the Ghost Walk provides 30% 'bonus' movement speed.

wikiNote: 这是从 Wiki 发现但本地数据库缺失的条目

description.zh: 你对未被上一次能量攻击命中的目标发起的盈能攻击，在命中时不会消耗任何盈能层数。此外，当处于完全盈能状态时，你的下一次普攻在命中时会造成相当于目标当前生命值 10% 的额外魔法伤害。
description.en: Your Energized attacks against targets not hit by your previous Energized attack do not consume any Energize stacks on-hit. Additionally, when fully Energized, your next basic attack deals 'bonus' magic damage on-hit equal to 10% of the target's 'current' health.

wikiNote: 这是从 Wiki 发现但本地数据库缺失的条目

description.zh:
触发条件：在进行冲刺或闪烁后

效果：获得一个持续 2 秒的护盾

护盾值：65 – 290（基于等级） (+ 65% 攻击力) (+ 26% 法术强度)冷却时间：5秒
description.en: After dash or blink, gain a shield that lasts for 2 seconds and absorbs 65 to 290 (+ 65% AD) (+ 26% AP) damage (5 second cooldown).

wikiNote: 这是从 Wiki 发现但本地数据库缺失的条目

description.zh: 升级[[收集者]]，强化“死神”效果，使其处决阈值在每次击杀敌方英雄时增加 0.5%，上限为目标最大生命值的 15%；同时强化“收税”效果，击杀时额外产生 25 金币（总计50）。此外，获得 250 金币。
description.en: Upgrades [[The Collector]], empowering Death to have its execution threshold increased by 0.5% each time you kill an enemy champion, capped at a threshold of 15% of the target's 'maximum' health, and Taxes to generate a further 25G (total 50G) from kills. Additionally, gain 250G.

description.en: Receive 1750 Gold. Thanks chat! :)

description.zh: 每 25-15 (基于等级) 秒，你周围会随机出现一个红包。拾取红包可获得 8-15 到 22-46 (基于等级) 金币，并获得 150 移动速度，持续 4 秒。
description.en: Red Envelopes appear randomly around you every 25-15 (based on level) seconds. Picking them up grants 8-15 to 22-46 (based on level) Gold and 150 Move Speed for 4 seconds.

description.zh:
周期性地出现一个小蛋糕飞越整个大桥。接住小蛋糕会获得 15 金币。

小蛋糕会为拾取者及附近的友军 回复 50-250 (基于等级) +8%已损失生命值 的生命值，但会被施加 25% 减速，持续 0.5 秒。

额外收益：你的小蛋糕每累计治疗 1000 生命值，就会提供 150 金币。
description.en:
Periodically a Cupcake flies across the bridge. Catch it to gain 15 Gold.

The Cupcake restores 50-250 (based on level) +8% missing Health to the collector and nearby allies, but applies a 25% Slow for 0.5 seconds.

Bonus: Every 1000 Health your Cupcake heals grants you 150 Gold.

description.zh:
当你产生 暴击 时，发射 1+x (+300%暴击率) 个爆竹。每个爆竹造成 20-100 (基于等级) 的魔法伤害。

此外，获得 25% 暴击几率。
description.en:
Upon dealing a Critical Strike, fire 1+x (+300% Critical Strike Chance) Firecrackers. Each Firecracker deals 20-100 (based on level) magic damage.

Additionally, gain 25% Critical Strike Chance.

description.zh:
造成技能伤害时，发射 1+x (+300%暴击率) 个爆竹。每个爆竹造成 15 (10-30 基于等级 +7%额外攻击力 +7%法术强度) 魔法伤害。

此外，获得 15%暴击几率。
description.en:
Dealing ability damage fires 1+x (+300% Critical Strike Chance) Firecrackers. Each Firecracker deals 15 (10-30 based on level +7% Bonus AD +7% AP) magic damage.

Additionally, gain 15% Critical Strike Chance.

description.zh: 每25秒，自动施放一道闪亮宝冠降临在你头上。当它着陆时，获得洛的终极技能，魅惑你碰到的敌人们。
description.en: Every 25 seconds, Autocast a sparkly tiara descends upon you. When it lands, gain Rakan's Ultimate, charming enemies you touch.

description.zh:
每10秒，以一个不断交替的旋律来自动施放坚毅咏叹调和迅捷奏鸣曲。
坚毅咏叹调治疗附近友军并提供一个临时的护盾光环。
迅捷奏鸣曲提供一个临时光环来提供额外移动速度
description.en:
Every 10 seconds, automatically cast the Aria of Perseverence and Song of Celerity in an alternating melody.
Aria of Perseverence heals nearby allies and grants a temporary shielding aura.
Song of Celerity grants a temporary aura that provides bonus Movement Speed.

description.zh:
自动施放：每 7 秒，获得 40% 移动速度 并召唤 3 道烈焰环绕自身。烈焰会自动瞄准范围内最近的可见英雄，造成 35-160 (基于等级) +25%法术强度 +25%额外攻击力 的 自适应伤害。

后续烈焰对相同目标的命中仅造成 30% 伤害。
description.en:
Autocast: Every 7 seconds, gain 40% Move Speed and conjure 3 orbiting flames. These flames target the closest visible enemy champion in range, dealing 35-160 (based on level) +25% AP +25% Bonus AD Adaptive damage.

Subsequent hits against the same target deal 30% damage.

description.zh: 你的雪球获得50技能急速，造成额外的100-500（基于等级）真实伤害并且可以从墙体上反弹。每次反弹会提升它25%体型、20%造成伤害，并且缩短它30%冷却时间。
description.en: Your Snowball gains 50 Ability Haste, deals extra 100-500 (based on level) true damage and bounces off walls. Each bounce increases its size by 25%, increases its damage dealt by 20% and reduces its Cooldown by 30%.

description.zh:
获得100雪球技能急速。

当你使用雪球冲刺时，你会获得持续1.5秒的无敌。

如果你没有雪球，你会获得一个雪球。
description.en:
Gain 100 Ability Haste on Snowball.

You become Invulnerable for 1.5 seconds when you dash with Snowball.

If you don't have one, gain a Snowball.

description.zh: 获得2个属性锻造器
description.en: Gain 2 Stat Anvils!

description.zh: 获得3个锻造器，金色和彩色锻造器概率增加
description.en: Gain 3 Stat Anvils, with a higher chance of Gold and Prismatic Anvils!

description.zh: 获得4个锻造器，金色和彩色锻造器概率增加
description.en: Gain 4 Stat Anvils, with a higher chance of Gold and Prismatic Anvils! On your next Augment selection, gain one additional reroll per slot.

description.zh:
当你产生 暴击 时，发射 1+x (+300%暴击率) 个爆竹。每个爆竹造成 11-40 (基于等级) +7%额外攻击力 +10%法术强度 的魔法伤害。

此外，获得 25% 暴击几率。

该符文暂时被禁用。
description.en:
Upon dealing a Critical Strike, fire 1+x (+300% Critical Strike Chance) Firecrackers. Each Firecracker deals 11-40 (based on level) +7% Bonus AD +10% AP magic damage.

Additionally, gain 25% Critical Strike Chance. This augment is currently disabled.

description.zh:
核心机制：施加一个灼烧时，会在附近掉落一滩持续 5秒 的辣椒油。辣椒油每秒会为友军提供 60-150 (基于等级) 生命值 回复，并对敌人造成 100 魔法伤害。

你施加的每个灼烧都会使辣椒油的效果变得更强。
description.en:
Applying a Burn drops a Chili Oil pool nearby for 5s. Chili Oil restores 60-150 (based on level) Health and deals 100 Magic Damage to enemies per second.

Chili Oil effects become stronger for each Burn you apply.

description.zh: 技能命中敌人获得1法术强度，如果不是第一个强化符文则自带40法术强度
description.en: Dealing damage to an enemy grants 1 AP, and grants 40 AP if it is not the first augment.

description.zh:
你周期性地召集魄罗。伤害一个敌人时会对其发射所有魄罗，每个魄罗造成目标3%最大生命值真实伤害以及短暂的击退。

每个队伍仅有1个玩家可以拿到它
description.en:
You gather Poros over time. Damaging an enemy fires all Poros at them, each dealing target's 3% max Health true damage and briefly Knocking Back.

Each team can only have one Poro Blaster.

description.zh:
参与击杀后会让你变小4%，每次提供8技能急速和1%移动速度。
阵亡时损失65%层数。
description.en:
Takedowns grant a stack that makes you 4% smaller, grants 8 Ability Haste, and 1% Movement Speed.
Lose 65% stacks on death.

description.zh:
在脱离战斗 20-5 (基于等级) 秒 后，你的 [[荆棘之甲]] 或 [[棘刺背心]] 会产生一层 荆棘甲壳。

荆棘甲壳：使你下次受到的普通攻击对攻击者回敬 50-250 (基于等级) (+12% 最大生命值) (+30% 护甲和魔法抗性) 物理伤害。

该效果会在触发一次后进入冷却。
description.en:
After being out of combat for 20-5s (based on level), your [[Thornmail]] or [[Bramble Vest]] generates a Thorn Shell.

Thorn Shell: Your next received Attack reflects 50-250 (based on level) (+12% max Health) (+30% Resists) Physical Damage to the attacker.

This effect is consumed on trigger and refreshes after exiting combat.

description.zh:
将一个召唤师技能替换为 【魄罗之王的弹跳】！

【魄罗之王的弹跳】：
在 3秒 内变身为魄罗国王！期间获得 无视碰撞体积 与 不可阻挡 状态，并获得 70% 伤害减免 以及 40% 移动速度。变身期间你会被 沉默 且 无法攻击。

此外，你每 1秒 会进行一次跳跃，着陆时对附近敌人造成 100-700 (基于等级) 物理伤害 并将其 击退。

魄罗国王在每次施放期间无法对同一名敌人造成多次击退。
description.en:
Replace a Summoner Spell with [Bounce of the Poro King]!

[Bounce of the Poro King]:
For 3s, transform into the Poro King! You become Unstoppable and Ghosted, gaining 70% Damage Reduction and 40% Movement Speed, but become Silenced and Disarmed.

Additionally, bounce every 1s, dealing (100-700 based on level) Physical Damage and Knocking Back nearby enemies on landing.

The Poro King cannot Knock Back the same enemy more than once per cast.

description.zh:
获得 25% 适应之力。附近的友方小兵获得 极大增强。

（该效果会提升小兵的伤害、抗性与体型）
description.en:
Gain 25% Adaptive Force. Nearby allied minions are greatly empowered.

(Minions gain increased damage, resistances, and size.)

description.zh:
你与【小恶魔】签订了契约。

契约代价：每秒损失 0.1% 当前生命值。若附近存在敌方英雄，则代价提升至每秒 5% 当前生命值。

契约回报：你的攻击和技能造成 15% 额外真实伤害，并在附近生成持续 5秒 的残骸。拾取残骸会 回复 50-150 (基于等级) (+50% 额外攻击力) (+25% 法术强度) 生命值 并获得 15% 移动速度，持续 1秒。

参与击杀英雄会使小恶魔进入狂热状态，在短时间内提升此强化效果。
description.en:
Forge a pact with The Little Devil.

The Sacrifice: Lose 0.1% current Health per second, increased to 5% current Health while near enemies.

The Reward: Attacks and Abilities deal 15% bonus True Damage and spawn Remnants nearby for 5s. Collecting a Remnant restores 50-150 (based on level) (+50% bonus AD) (+25% AP) Health and grants 15% Movement Speed for 1s.

Champion takedowns send the Devil into a frenzy, amplifying these effects for a short duration.

description.zh:
你的普通攻击会 处决 生命值低于 (5% +0.002% 额外生命值 +0.035% 基础攻击力) 最大生命值的敌方英雄。成功处决时，为你 回复 100-300 (基于等级) (+25% 额外生命值) 生命值 并 击退 目标。

被击退的敌人在撞击地形、敌人或到达终点时会产生爆炸，对附近敌人造成 150-500 (基于等级) (+100% 额外护甲) (+50% 额外魔法抗性) 魔法伤害。

核心联动：这些爆炸效果可以 连环触发。
description.en:
Your Attacks Execute enemy champions below (5% +0.002% bonus Health +0.035% base AD) max Health. Executing a champion restores 100-300 (based on level) (+25% bonus Health) Health and Knocks Back the target.

Upon colliding with terrain, enemies, or reaching max distance, Knocked Back units explode, dealing 150-500 (based on level) (+100% bonus Armor) (+50% bonus Magic Resist) Magic Damage to nearby enemies.

Chain Reaction: These explosions can Chain.

description.zh:
通过与前一次不同的普通攻击或技能对敌方英雄造成伤害时，可获得 评价等级 (从 F 提升至 S)。

每层 评价等级 提供 2.8%-3.5% (基于等级) 移动速度。

在达到 等级 S 时，会消耗所有层数并在 2秒 内向附近所有敌人倾泻 10次 弹雨。每次射击造成 10-40 (基于等级) (+35% 额外攻击力) (+20% 法术强度) 物理伤害。对生命值低于 30% 的敌人会产生 暴击，造成 20-80 (基于等级) (+70% 额外攻击力) (+40% 法术强度) 物理伤害。 (冷却时间：15秒)。

射击可触发生命偷取效果，但对小兵仅造成 25% 伤害。
description.en:
Damaging enemy champions with Attacks or Abilities different from the previous one grants Style (from F to S).

Gain 2.8%-3.5% (based on level) Movement Speed per Style rank.

At Rank S, consume all Style to unleash a torrent of gunshots at all nearby enemies 10 times over 2s. Each shot deals 10-40 (based on level) (+35% bonus AD) (+20% AP) Physical Damage. Enemies below 30% Health are struck Critically for 20-80 (based on level) (+70% bonus AD) (+40% AP) Physical Damage. (Cooldown: 15s).

Shots apply Lifesteal and deal 25% damage to minions.

description.zh:
为友军提供 治疗 或 护盾 会对其施加持续 8秒 的祝福。被祝福的友军对敌方英雄造成伤害时，你会获得 【虔诚】 叠层。

在达到 50层【虔诚】 时，会释放一道冲击波，造成 50-300 (基于等级) (+75000% 治疗和护盾强度) 魔法伤害，并 处决 生命值低于 (25% 治疗和护盾强度) 的敌人。
description.en:
Healing or Shielding an ally blesses them for 8s. When blessed allies deal damage to enemy champions, you gain stacks of Devotion.

At 50 Devotion, unleash a shockwave that deals 50-300 (based on level) (+75000% Heal and Shield Power) Magic Damage and Executes enemies below (25% Heal and Shield Power) Health.

description.zh:
立即：获得一件 [[斑比的熔渣]]，且你能够同时购买 2 件【献祭】类装备。

达成要求：同时拥有 [[日炎圣盾]] 和 [[璀璨回响]]。

任务奖励：[[日炎圣盾]] 与 [[璀璨回响]] 将会融合成 [[虚空献祭]]。
description.en:
Immediately: Gain a [[Bami's Cinder]] and you can purchase 2 Immolate Items.

Requirement: Possess both [[Sunfire Aegis]] and [[Hollow Radiance]].

Reward: [[Sunfire Aegis]] and [[Hollow Radiance]] combine into [[Void Immolation]].

description.zh:
获得 30 终极技能极速。

施放终极技能后，获得 50% 伤害减免 并 嘲讽 周围敌人，持续 2秒。
description.en:
Gain 30 Ultimate Haste.

After casting your Ultimate, gain 50% Damage Reduction and Taunt nearby enemies for 2s.

description.zh:
你的【敌人消失】信号会在目标位置发射一枚飞弹。

飞弹对敌人造成 100-400 (基于等级) (+10% 目标已损失生命值) 魔法伤害，并为范围内的友军提供 50-200 (基于等级) (+10% 目标已损失生命值) 生命值 回复。
description.en:
Your Missing Pings launch a missile at the targeted location.

The missile deals 100-400 (based on level) (+10% target's Missing Health) Magic Damage to enemies and restores 50-200 (based on level) (+10% target's Missing Health) Health to allies.

description.zh:
用技能伤害敌人时，会留下持续 6秒 的 虚空裂痕。若在附近产生另一个 虚空裂痕，则会消耗两者并在其间开启一道 虚空裂隙。

虚空裂隙：对范围内的敌人造成 100-450 (基于等级) (+550% 护甲穿透) (+550% 固定法术穿透) 魔法伤害，并施加 99% 减速，在 1秒 内衰减。
description.en:
Damaging enemies with an Ability creates a Void Scar for 6s. If another Void Scar is created nearby, both are consumed to open a Void Rift between them.

Void Rift: Deals 100-450 (based on level) (+550% Armor Pen) (+550% Flat Magic Pen) Magic Damage to enemies inside and applies a 99% Slow, decaying over 1s.

description.zh: 护盾过期后会爆炸，对周围敌人造成盾值等量魔法伤害
description.en: Your shields will detonate on expiration.

description.zh: 获得相当于你40%暴击几率的技能急速。
description.en: Gain Ability Haste equal to 40% of your Critical Strike Chance.

description.zh: 你的暴击施加一次额外的攻击特效。获得25%暴击几率。
description.en: Your Critical Strikes apply On-Hit effects an additional time. Gain 25% Critical Strike Chance.

description.zh: 周期性地使你的下一个伤害型技能或攻击触发一道闪电爆裂，连锁穿过敌人以造成伤害和减速。
description.en: Periodically your next damaging Ability or Attack triggers a lightning blast, chaining through enemies to deal damage and Slow.

description.zh: 在朝着低于40%生命值的敌人时，获得60%移动速度
description.en: Gain 60% Movement Speed towards enemies below 40% health.

description.zh:
获得 10% 冷却缩减。

核心转换：你的所有 攻击速度 都会被转化为 技能极速。每 1% 攻击速度 转换为 0.65 技能极速。

（该效果包含基础攻击速度加成及来自装备、符文的加成）
description.en:
Gain 10% Cooldown Reduction.

Inherent Conversion: Converts all Attack Speed into Ability Haste. Every 1% Attack Speed grants 0.65 Ability Haste.

(This includes Attack Speed from all sources.)

description.zh: 用一个技能对一个敌方英雄造成伤害时，获得在1秒里持续衰减的200移动速度。
description.en: Gain 200 Movement Speed when damaging an enemy champion with an Ability, decaying over 1 second.

description.zh:
用技能命中敌方英雄时，会获得一层持续 6秒 的 【爆气】 (最高 6层)。

每层 【爆气】 都会使你的非终极技能剩余冷却时间缩短 2.5%。达到满层时，该缩减效果提升至 5.0%。
description.en:
Striking enemy champions with Abilities grants a stack of Popoff for 6s (max 6 stacks).

Each stack reduces your remaining non-Ultimate Ability Cooldowns by 2.5%, increased to 5.0% per stack at max stacks.

description.zh: 获得25%暴击率和35%攻击速度，这两个效果受益于法术强度
description.en: Gain 25% Critical Strike Chance and 35% Attack Speed, both of which benefit from Ability Power.

description.zh:
将一个召唤师技能替换为骄行荡寇(阿克尚E)。

骄行荡寇发射一根钩爪，吸附在地形上，在此之后，你可以再次施放来绕着它摆荡。在摆荡状态下，自动攻击相距最近的那个敌人。在与一个敌方英雄碰撞或再次施放时结束摆荡。
description.en:
Replace a Summoner Spell with Heroic Swing.

Heroic Swing fires a grappling hook, sticking into terrain, after which you can Recast to swing around it. While swinging, automatically Attack the nearest enemy. Colliding with an enemy champion or Recasting ends the swing.

description.zh: 获得生机进发作为一个召唤师技能。生机进发会猛然提升你的体型，击飞附近的敌人们1秒并提供持续7秒的（）最大生命值。
description.en:
Gain Growth Spurt as a Summoner Spell.

Growth Spurt suddenly increases your size, Knocking Up nearby enemies and granting max Health.

description.zh:
获得 100% 攻击速度。

在你拥有[[花晓之剑]]时，你对英雄的攻击造成 50% 伤害，但使来自[[花晓之剑]]的治疗效果提升 250%。
description.en:
Gain 100% Attack Speed.

While you own [[Sword of Blossoming Dawn]], your attacks against champions deal 50% damage but increase healing from [[Sword of Blossoming Dawn]] by 250%.
